data.title: Prototype Roadmap — Base System to First Testable Version
data.scope: Base prototype on MNIST to first measurable test result. Excludes: reasoned library, second meta-level system, weighted graphs, hyperedges (unless Phase 6 forces it), full self-evolving rewrite system.

phases.title: Graph Substrate and Operations
phases.description: Implement directed graph structure with binary edge typing (structural / operational). Implement the Graph Operation Interface: match, apply, revert, complexity, lookup, register. Unit test each operation group on hand-constructed graphs. No layer structure yet — flat graphs only.
phases.exit_condition: All five operation groups work correctly on hand-constructed test graphs.

phases.title: Input Layer and Quantization
phases.description: Define quantization scheme: pixels to discrete graph primitives (nodes + structural edges). Implement input layer as immutable. Verify same image produces same graph deterministically.
phases.exit_condition: MNIST images reliably converted to base graphs. Sample manually inspected and encoding confirmed sane.
phases.open_decision: Quantization scheme not yet defined — must be resolved before implementation.

phases.title: Layer Structure and Compression
phases.description: Implement multi-layer structure. Layer identity is representational scale, not operation type. Implement layer fusion and splitting. Implement per-layer rulesets. Layer boundaries earned through GA convergence.
phases.exit_condition: System can take a base graph, apply rules, and promote recurring label-correlated subgraphs into upper-layer nodes.

phases.title: Empirical Library
phases.description: Implement rule-invariant pair storage. Implement label-correlation filter. Implement library lookup. Implement recognition cascade.
phases.exit_condition: After exposure to a subset of MNIST, library contains non-trivial entries. Lookup on a new image returns matches.

phases.title: Traversal Loop
phases.description: Implement traversal loop: apply rules, evaluate compression, update library, repeat. Reversibility enforced. Rules fixed for this phase.
phases.exit_condition: System traverses a batch of MNIST images, builds a library, can be queried.

phases.title: Minimal GA over Rule Graphs
phases.description: GA on rule graphs. Fitness signal: given a fixed label, minimize variance in subgraph structures produced across different images with that label. Library entry is byproduct of convergence. Fixed GA primitives — self-evolution deferred.
phases.rationale: Load-bearing for empirical library. Without rule improvement, label-conditioned reproducibility is not achievable.
phases.exit_condition: Rule quality improves across generations. Library entries stabilize.
phases.open_decision: Initial rule set for burn-in before GA activates not yet defined.

phases.title: First Test and Decision Gates
phases.description: Run on MNIST training subset, evaluate on test subset. Measure accuracy, library size, matching cost. Inspect failure modes for q_07 and q_09 signals. Make hyperedge decision based on evidence.
phases.exit_condition: A number exists and q_07 has a documented empirical answer.

known_risks: Isomorphism cost — must be profiled in Phase 6.
Quantization design is load-bearing — poor encoding limits discoverability.
GA cold start — burn-in pass with random rules likely needed before fitness signal is meaningful.
